project_type: TypeScript monorepo - 9-app mega-ecosystem (chat, email, social, ads, streaming, photo/video, editor, dating/random-chat, AI hub) with 6 shared packages
build_system: npm workspaces monorepo - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network, all code self-contained
verification_instructions: 1. Run node scripts/test.js to validate structure. 2. Verify new files exist and have substantial content (200+ lines each). 3. Check consistent React pattern across all frontend files.
setup_instructions: No setup - Node.js v22 pre-installed. All code written directly with no external deps.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - NO npm install, NO external packages. All code must be self-contained TypeScript. Use only Node.js built-in APIs. Write complete implementations inline.
contribution_requirements: 1. All frontend must use proper React with hooks (useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo, useRef). 2. Extract shared Router/middleware into packages/server. 3. App AI services must delegate to packages/ai. 4. JWT validation must use packages/auth TokenService. 5. Consistent CorsOptions interface everywhere.
key_patterns: Backend: Router class, middleware stack (rate limiter, CORS, security, logging, error handler), controller->service->model. Frontend: React.FC with hooks, typed props interfaces, state management, API integration, loading/error/empty states. Files: 150-400 lines each with complete logic.
directory_structure:
/ - root monorepo
/apps/ - 9 applications (quantchat, quantmail, quantsync, quantads, quantube, quantneon, quantedits, quantmax, quantai)
/packages/ - 6 shared libs (common, database, auth, ai, shared-ui, realtime) + new packages/server
/scripts/ - build/dev scripts
Each app: api/ (server.ts, middleware/, routes/, controllers/, services/) + src/ (pages/, components/, services/, types/, hooks/)
